title: GROUP_ADD uses serde_json::from_value(unwrap_or_default) inconsistently with other methods
description: ws.rs GROUP_ADD and SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST use serde_json::from_value(req.params.unwrap_or_default()) while all other methods use the deserialize_params() helper. The inconsistency means GROUP_ADD silently accepts a missing params field (substituting a null JSON value and attempting deserialization) rather than returning INVALID_PARAMS. Use deserialize_params() consistently so missing-params errors are caught uniformly.
